title: Doc2CV Input
description: Upload document files (max 10) to generate a CV.

files.title: Document Files
files.description: Public URLs of PDF or image files (JPG, PNG). Maximum 10 files.

language.title: Document Language
language.description: Primary language of the documents for OCR.

useProfileTransformer.title: Enable Profile Transformer (LLM)
useProfileTransformer.description: When enabled, calls Cloudflare Workers AI to generate a professional profile summary.
